worlds.name: Seedling Meadow
worlds.description: Sunny grass, leaves, flowers, bees, and soft clouds.

worlds.name: Lantern Grove
worlds.description: Twilight trees, warm lanterns, mushrooms, and dark wood.

worlds.name: Moonlit Pond
worlds.description: Lily pads, reeds, ripples, and silver moonlight.

worlds.name: Crystal Conservatory
worlds.description: A glass greenhouse filled with vines, gems, and prism light.

worlds.name: Cloud Orchard
worlds.description: Floating orchards, fruit trees, clouds, and windmills.

worlds.name: Starlight Terrace
worlds.description: Constellations, comets, moon flowers, and glowing paths.
